name: שום
prompt:
Ultra realistic grocery product photo of fresh garlic bulb (3-5 pieces).

STRICT REQUIREMENTS:
- pure white background (#FFFFFF), completely clean and uniform
- no gradients, no shadows on background
- no water droplets
- no moisture
- no condensation
- no reflections
- no shine or gloss effect
- no dramatic lighting
- no studio effects
- no artistic styling
- no macro photography
- no fake perfection

PRODUCT STYLE:
- natural look, like real supermarket produce
- slightly imperfect texture
- matte surface (not glossy)

COMPOSITION:
- centered
- simple
- clean
- natural arrangement (not perfectly symmetrical)

LIGHTING:
- soft, flat lighting (like catalog photography)
- minimal shadow under product only

IMPORTANT:
This must look like a real grocery store catalog image (Shufersal, Walmart, Tesco).
It must NOT look like AI-generated or advertisement.
